# League Mode — Data Model

> Companion to [`README.md`](README.md). All schemas obey the contracts in [`docs/rxdb-persistence.md`](../rxdb-persistence.md): every change bumps `version`, ships a `migrationStrategies` entry on the collection-creator config object, and indexes its `required` fields.

## Single-library invariant

**All teams** — built-in, user-created, autogenerated for a league — live in the **existing `customTeams` collection.** League state references teams by `customTeamId`. There is no `leagueTeams` collection and no alternate team type. This is the most important invariant in the whole subsystem; revisit [`decisions.md`](decisions.md) #7 and #A3 before proposing anything that splits the team library.

Implications:

- The setup wizard's "autogenerate" action **writes generated teams into `customTeams` immediately**. They appear in the user's library, can be edited via the existing Custom Team Editor, can be exported/imported, and can be reused in future leagues.
- The Custom Team Editor schema (positions, batting/pitching blocks, sanitization) is the **only** team schema. League features extend `customTeams` only via additive optional fields (e.g., `autogen` marker), never with new `type` discriminators.
- Removing a team from a league does **not** delete the `customTeams` doc.

## Roster-edit lock contract

A `customTeams` doc is **locked from direct edits** while it satisfies all of:

1. There exists at least one `seasons` doc with `status === 'active'`, AND
2. that season's `leagues[].teamIds` includes this `customTeamId`.

Locked docs are:

- **Read-only in the Custom Team Editor route.** Form is rendered but disabled with a banner; deep-link to the season's team-management page is shown.
- **Write-rejected at the storage layer.** A `customTeamStore.update()` (or any equivalent write API) called against a locked doc throws `CustomTeamLockedError` unless the call is tagged with a sanctioned-write context (see below).

Sanctioned mutation paths — these set the sanctioned-write context and bypass the storage lock:

| Path                                      | Version | What it writes                                                                                                                                                        |
| ----------------------------------------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| In-season trade engine                    | v3      | Updates `seasonPlayerState.seasonTeamId` and `seasonTeams.rosterSnapshot`. **Does not touch `customTeams`.**                                                          |
| IL move (injury / recovery)               | v2      | Updates `seasonPlayerState.injuryStatus` and `seasonTeams.rosterSnapshot`. **Does not touch `customTeams`.**                                                          |
| Lineup / rotation update inside season UI | v2      | Updates `seasonTeams.rosterSnapshot`. **Does not touch `customTeams`.**                                                                                               |
| Minor-league call-up / demotion           | v4      | Updates `seasonTeams.rosterSnapshot` and `customTeams.minorLeaguePlayerIds[]`. The `customTeams` write is sanctioned.                                                 |
| Offseason carryover write-back            | v4      | Writes back current `rosterSnapshot` into `customTeams`. Runs only **after** the season has transitioned to `complete`/`abandoned` (so the lock is already released). |
| Setup-wizard autogen team creation        | v1      | Creates a new `customTeams` doc. The new doc is not yet in any active league, so no lock applies at creation time.                                                    |

Notably, **none of the v1–v3 sanctioned paths write to `customTeams` itself** — they all live in season-scoped state (`seasonTeams.rosterSnapshot`, `seasonPlayerState`). The customTeams doc remains the team's "permanent self" while season state captures in-flight changes. v4 carryover is the only path that ever propagates season changes back to `customTeams`, and it runs after lock release.

Implementation:

- A `withSanctionedCustomTeamWrite(context, fn)` helper wraps every sanctioned write site, threading the context through to `customTeamStore`. The store checks `context != null` before bypassing the lock.
- Lock check is a fast indexed query: `seasons.find({ status: 'active' }).exec()` → flatten `leagues[].teamIds` → `Set<customTeamId>`. Cached per write batch.
- Write rejection logs via the shared logger and throws a typed error so UI can show a friendly message.

This contract is reaffirmed in the user-facing [`README.md`](README.md) non-negotiable contracts section.

## New collections

All collections below are introduced in v1 unless noted.

### `seasons` (v1)

One document per season — the top-level league/season record.

| Field                  | Type                                                                                 | Notes                                                                           |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `id`                   | string (primary)                                                                     | Generated via `generateSeasonId()` (new helper added in `@storage/generateId`). |
| `name`                 | string                                                                               | User-supplied or default ("Spring 2026").                                       |
| `status`               | `'active' \| 'complete' \| 'abandoned'`                                              | Only one `'active'` season at a time (decision #8).                             |
| `createdAt`            | number (epoch ms)                                                                    | Indexed.                                                                        |
| `completedAt`          | number \| null                                                                       |                                                                                 |
| `preset`               | `'mini' \| 'standard' \| 'full'`                                                     | Decision #1.                                                                    |
| `seasonLength`         | `'sprint' \| 'standard' \| 'marathon'`                                               | Decision #2.                                                                    |
| `masterSeed`           | string (base-36)                                                                     | All in-season randomness derives from this.                                     |
| `leagues`              | `Array<{ id; name; teamIds: string[]; dhEnabled: boolean; divisions?: Division[] }>` | One or more leagues per season; v1 ships 1 or 2 leagues, v2 adds divisions.     |
| `tradeDeadlineGameDay` | number \| null                                                                       | `null` = "no deadline" (decision #14). v3+ field; reserved/null in v1–v2.       |
| `playoffFormat`        | `'short' \| 'default' \| 'long' \| null`                                             | v3+ field; null in v1–v2.                                                       |
| `featureFlags`         | `{ shareableSeasonSeeds?: boolean; allowReplay?: boolean }`                          | **Snapshot at creation time.** Flipping a flag mid-season is a no-op.           |
| `currentGameDay`       | number                                                                               | Advances as games complete.                                                     |
| `championTeamId`       | string \| null                                                                       | Set when `status` becomes `'complete'`.                                         |

Indexes: `status`, `createdAt`.

### `seasonTeams` (v1)

One document per team-in-season. **Snapshot of the team's roster at the moment the season started**, plus per-season state. The underlying `customTeams` doc may be edited freely without disturbing in-flight seasons.

| Field             | Type             | Notes                                                                                                              |
| ----------------- | ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `id`              | string (primary) | `${seasonId}:${customTeamId}`.                                                                                     |
| `seasonId`        | string           | Indexed.                                                                                                           |
| `leagueId`        | string           | Indexed. References `seasons.leagues[].id`.                                                                        |
| `customTeamId`    | string           | References `customTeams`. Indexed.                                                                                 |
| `rosterSnapshot`  | object           | Frozen copy of the customTeams doc's lineup/bench/rotation at season start. Per-season trades and IL operate here. |
| `wins`            | number           |                                                                                                                    |
| `losses`          | number           |                                                                                                                    |
| `ties`            | number           | (For abandoned-game scenarios; v3+ may eliminate.)                                                                 |
| `runDifferential` | number           |                                                                                                                    |
| `divisionId`      | string \| null   | v2+ when divisions are enabled.                                                                                    |

Indexes: `seasonId`, `leagueId`, `customTeamId`.

### `seasonGames` (v1)

One document per scheduled game.

| Field              | Type                                          | Notes                                                                                                        |
| ------------------ | --------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `id`               | string (primary)                              | `generateSeasonGameId()`.                                                                                    |
| `seasonId`         | string                                        | Indexed.                                                                                                     |
| `gameDay`          | number                                        | Indexed.                                                                                                     |
| `homeSeasonTeamId` | string                                        |                                                                                                              |
| `awaySeasonTeamId` | string                                        |                                                                                                              |
| `seriesId`         | string                                        | Multiple games share a series.                                                                               |
| `status`           | `'scheduled' \| 'in_progress' \| 'completed'` |                                                                                                              |
| `boxscore`         | object \| null                                | Result snapshot. Detailed structure deferred to implementation; must be enough to recompute aggregate stats. |
| `derivedSeed`      | string                                        | Cached `deriveScheduledGameSeed(seasonId, id)` for replay determinism.                                       |
| `completedAt`      | number \| null                                |                                                                                                              |

Indexes: `seasonId`, `gameDay`, `status`.

**Idempotency contract:** completion writes use `seasonGameId` as the unique key; double-completion is a no-op (returns existing record).

### `seasonPlayerState` (v1, v2 schema bump)

One document per player-in-season. Holds rolling state — pitcher availability (v1), wear/injury (v2), running stats (v2+).

**v1 fields:**

| Field                     | Type             | Notes                                            |
| ------------------------- | ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `id`                      | string (primary) | `${seasonId}:${playerId}`.                       |
| `seasonId`                | string           | Indexed.                                         |
| `seasonTeamId`            | string           | Indexed; updates on trade.                       |
| `playerId`                | string           | References the player inside the rosterSnapshot. |
| `pitcherDaysRest`         | number           | 0 = pitched today; only meaningful for SP/RP.    |
| `pitcherAvailability`     | number (0..1)    | 1 = fully fresh; <0.5 = "Tired"; <0.2 = "Spent". |
| `pitcherStartsThisSeason` | number           |                                                  |

**v2 additive fields (schema v2):**

| Field          | Type                                               | Notes                                        |
| -------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `wear`         | number (0..10)                                     | Position-player fatigue. Resets on rest day. |
| `injuryStatus` | `{ kind: string; ilUntilGameDay: number } \| null` | Injury report row.                           |
| `seasonStats`  | object                                             | Running stat lines used for awards (v4).     |

Migration strategy v1 → v2: defaults `wear = 0`, `injuryStatus = null`, `seasonStats = emptyStats()`.

Indexes: `seasonId`, `seasonTeamId`.

### `seasonTransactions` (v3)

One document per transaction (trade, call-up, IL move).

| Field       | Type                                                                       |
| ----------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `id`        | string (primary)                                                           |
| `seasonId`  | string (indexed)                                                           |
| `gameDay`   | number (indexed)                                                           |
| `kind`      | `'trade' \| 'il_in' \| 'il_out' \| 'callup' \| 'demote'`                   |
| `payload`   | object — kind-specific structure (e.g., trade asset lists, IL injury kind) |
| `createdAt` | number                                                                     |

### `seasonAwards` (v4)

One document per (season, award).

| Field            | Type                                                                |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `id`             | string (primary) — `${seasonId}:${awardKey}`                        |
| `seasonId`       | string (indexed)                                                    |
| `awardKey`       | string — e.g. `'mvp_league_a'`, `'cy_young_league_b'`               |
| `winnerPlayerId` | string                                                              |
| `formula`        | object — composite breakdown so the awards screen can show the math |

### `seasonArchives` (v4, only if measured doc count exceeds budget)

Compressed archive of one completed season's `seasonGames` + `seasonTransactions` + `seasonPlayerState`.

| Field        | Type                           |
| ------------ | ------------------------------ |
| `id`         | string (primary, = `seasonId`) |
| `compressed` | base64 string (gzipped JSON)   |
| `archivedAt` | number                         |

`seasons` and `seasonAwards` are **not** archived — they remain queryable for the seasons list & history UI.

## Additive fields on existing collections

### `customTeams` (additive — schema bump only when these land)

| Field             | Type                                                                                | Version added | Notes                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `activeLeagueIds` | string[]                                                                            | v1            | Teams can sit in multiple historical seasons. v1 maintains "current active league" by filtering `seasons.leagues[].teamIds`. This field is denormalized cache for fast filtering. |
| `autogen`         | `{ version: number; theme: string; parity: string; baseSeed: string } \| undefined` | v1            | Present only on autogenerated teams. Powers regeneration for replay debugging (see autogen doc).                                                                                  |

These fields are **optional** so existing customTeams docs continue to validate. Migration strategy v(N) → v(N+1) sets them to `undefined`.

## Identifier helpers

Add to `src/storage/generateId.ts` (existing convention):

- `generateSeasonId()`
- `generateSeasonGameId()`
- `generateSeasonTransactionId()`

All ids use the same `nanoid`-style scheme as existing id helpers; never `Date.now()` / `Math.random()`.

## RxDB collection-count budget

Per the stored note about RxDB's 16-collection open limit:

| Collection           | Version added | Counts toward open limit |
| -------------------- | ------------- | ------------------------ |
| `seasons`            | v1            | yes                      |
| `seasonTeams`        | v1            | yes                      |
| `seasonGames`        | v1            | yes                      |
| `seasonPlayerState`  | v1            | yes                      |
| `seasonTransactions` | v3            | yes                      |
| `seasonAwards`       | v4            | yes                      |
| `seasonArchives`     | v4 (gated)    | yes (only if enabled)    |

Existing app already uses ~10 collections. Adding 4 in v1 brings us to ~14 — within budget. Adding all v4 collections + archive enabled brings us to ~17 — **over budget**. Action: in v4, before enabling `seasonArchives`, audit current collection count; if too high, either gate the archive collection lazily or collapse one of the historical collections into archive.

## Determinism notes

- `seasonGames.derivedSeed` is computed on schedule generation, not at game-launch time. This guarantees the seed is stable even if `deriveScheduledGameSeed`'s implementation changes later.
- `seasonTeams.rosterSnapshot` freezes the roster at season start. Mid-season team edits in the customTeams editor do not leak into the active season.
- `seasons.featureFlags` snapshot guarantees a season replay sees the same flag values as when it was created.
